2025-2026 Men's Basketball Roster

7 Oskar Olechnowicz

  • Position Guard
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown Brisbane, Australia
  • Highschool Anglican Church Grammar School
  • Major Cell and molecular biology
  • Height 6-5
  • Bio
  • Stats

Biography

High School:
Was the captain of the basketball team, Varsity MVP, GPS All Star 5 and Krum Tournament All Star 5.

Awards:
Fall 2025 Lone Star Conference Commission's Honor Roll

Personal:
Hopes to pursue basketball professionally and become a doctor. In his free time, enjoys fishing, collecting lego and listening to music.
